title: Bolivia mulls recognizing USDT as payment currency amid dollar shortage
summary: As foreign currency reserves remain under pressure, Bolivia is considering a framework to let the world’s largest stablecoin be used for payments, savings and trade.

title: Hyundai completes USDT treasury settlement pilot between US and Mexico
summary: Hyundai completed a proof-of-concept using Tether's USDT to settle a cross-border treasury transfer between its US and Mexican subsidiaries, highlighting growing enterprise interest in stablecoin-based payments.

title: Leveraged ETFs Safer Than Some Options: Tuttle
summary: Matthew Tuttle, CEO & CIO of Capital Management, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss T-REX 2X Long SKHY Daily Target ETF (Ticker: HYNX), the new fun targeting SK Hynix shares.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Leveraged ETFs Present New Risks: Brown
summary: Aaron Brown, Bloomberg Opinion & author, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." title: Strive (ASST) Adds 18 Bitcoin, Pushing Treasury to 19,900 BTC
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strive (ASST) purchased 18 bitcoin for about $1.2 million last week, increasing its treasury to 19,900 BTC while maintaining $154.1 million in cash as it continues integrating its bitcoin-focused treasury strategy.
